violations.text: Hand sink base located in the front kitchen area was not in good repair, inspector observed cracks throughout with exposed wood. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair, inspector observed missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
